talos goes back and hand feeds
the customer

the customer invites talos
to her farm.

stephanie tells talos that
he has to hand feed the customers.

talos serves it to the customer,
and immediately returns to
the kitchen
talos finishes his first soup.

1. Everythings fine
2. I have some small complaints
3. I do not know enough to
have an opinion

talos says that he's getting
the hang of things, complains
about the knives used

monika says that this is just
how things work.

monika mentions his 5 hour
meeting and how bad the backend
IT infrastructure is

monika also mentions how he
has a huge workload this week,
(lots of soups to deploy)

monkia and talos mention and
discuss that Boh'ne is coming
next week.

talos claims that he's improving,
but things are still rough.

talos complains that he isn't
allowed to bring in his own
better knives.

monika introduces the concept
of hygine.
and states that the cleavers
are 'industry standard'

monika then starts complaining
about talos's cloak.

talos insists that it's acceptable,
and becomes upset.

talos describes/introduces
the dunning-kruger thing in
his own words

talos mentions that this is
his first job (to monika)
talos introduces his qalifications

talos rants about how much
of a fiasco the job listing,
job-interview, and the job
actually is.

monika invites talos' to become
a code monkey, next year.

talos is also making his first
soup;- monkia asks about it

talos references the dunning-kruger
thing again.

monika tells talos to not stress
himself out about it.

talos continues cutting more
shamonions

talos reminises on Stephanie
and his current situation

talos's thoughts and daydreams
go rancid and he smashes the
shamonion rings he's just
made, unintentionally.

monika (concerned) drops in
and starts a conversation
with talos

stephanie gives talos some
more pointers and general
advice

Stephanie goes to attend to
other tasks

an irritated stephanie shows
talos how to chop it properly

Stephanie notices that talos
is chopping the shamonions
incorrectly.
